placeholderImages.description: Ultra-macro shot of a crystalline Ghost Train Haze bud, heavy with white trichomes against a pitch-black background.
Macro detail of artisanal hand-rolled joints, showing the texture of the organic paper against a dark void.
Extreme close-up of golden live resin diamonds, refracting light in a dark studio setting.
Macro shot of sugar-coated THC gummies, capturing individual sugar crystals on a matte black surface.
Close-up of a high-end ceramic vape tip, highlighting the sleek minimalist design against a dark backdrop.
Macro view of the precision teeth inside a matte black magnetic herb grinder.
Cinematic wide shot of a luxury dispensary interior with deep violet neon accents and dark, textured walls.
